title: Miscarriage follow-up documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Lists pain, amenorrhoea, bleeding, gastrointestinal symptoms, dizziness or syncope, shoulder-tip pain, urinary symptoms, tenderness, haemodynamic signs, pregnancy testing, and escalation criteria.
red_flags.rationale: Supports entered pain, bleeding, pregnancy history, observations and reassessment context.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists pain, amenorrhoea, bleeding, gastrointestinal symptoms, dizziness or syncope, shoulder-tip pain, urinary symptoms, tenderness, haemodynamic signs, pregnancy testing, and escalation criteria.

source.title: Ectopic pregnancy and miscarriage: diagnosis and initial management

investigations.text: Requires symptoms to take priority over hCG, limits hCG interpretation to appropriate clinical use, and requires clear worsening-symptom access and follow-up.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed follow-up and safety context where pregnancy location or serial testing remains relevant.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires symptoms to take priority over hCG, limits hCG interpretation to appropriate clinical use, and requires clear worsening-symptom access and follow-up.

source.title: Ectopic pregnancy and miscarriage: diagnosis and initial management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.8.1–1.8.10 — hCG in pregnancy of unknown location

source_limitations: Prior diagnosis, pregnancy location, management, bleeding, pain, infection features and results are absent.
No completion, retained tissue, infection, treatment or discharge conclusion is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
